name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl & Sopi operator backend — v5.38: remote cooling control. set_temp/set_cooling/defrost command types via the pull-queue, a POST /cooling endpoint with server-side 1-15C range guard that stores intended setpoint/on-off per machine, and a Cooling block in the machine Controls panel (setpoint apply, cooling on/off with confirm, defrost) with board-confirmed results in command history. Cumulative over v5.37.
